          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]

          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

      SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Amount], [t].[Date], [t].[Description], [t].[ProcessedBy], [a].[FullName] AS [UserFullName], [t].[BookingId], [t].[SpaceBookingId], CASE
          WHEN [p].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p].[Name]
          ELSE N'Mercado Pago'
      END AS [PaymentMethodName]
      FROM [Transactions] AS [t]
      INNER JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [t].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
      LEFT JOIN [PaymentMethods] AS [p] ON [t].[PaymentMethodId] = [p].[Id]
      WHERE [t].[Date] >= @__start_0 AND [t].[Date] <= @__end_1 AND (([t].[PaymentMethodId] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[PaymentMethodId] IN (

          FROM OPENJSON(@__mpMethodIds_2) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [m]
      )) OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%Mercado Pago%') OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%QR%'))
      ORDER BY [t].[Date] DESC

      FROM (
          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

      FROM [PaymentMethods] AS [p]

info: Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command[20101]
      Executed DbCommand (60ms) [Parameters=[@__start_0='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__end_1='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__mpMethodIds_2='?' (Size = 4000)], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Amount], [t].[Date], [t].[Description], [t].[ProcessedBy], [a].[FullName] AS [UserFullName], [t].[BookingId], [t].[SpaceBookingId], CASE
          WHEN [p].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p].[Name]
          ELSE N'Mercado Pago'
      END AS [PaymentMethodName]
      FROM [Transactions] AS [t]
      INNER JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [t].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
      LEFT JOIN [PaymentMethods] AS [p] ON [t].[PaymentMethodId] = [p].[Id]
      WHERE [t].[Date] >= @__start_0 AND [t].[Date] <= @__end_1 AND (([t].[PaymentMethodId] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[PaymentMethodId] IN (
          SELECT [m].[value]
          FROM OPENJSON(@__mpMethodIds_2) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [m]
      )) OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%Mercado Pago%') OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%QR%'))
      ORDER BY [t].[Date] DESC

      FROM (
          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

info: Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command[20101]
      Executed DbCommand (44ms) [Parameters=[@__start_0='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__end_1='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__mpMethodIds_2='?' (Size = 4000)], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Amount], [t].[Date], [t].[Description], [t].[ProcessedBy], [a].[FullName] AS [UserFullName], [t].[BookingId], [t].[SpaceBookingId], CASE
          WHEN [p].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p].[Name]
          ELSE N'Mercado Pago'
      END AS [PaymentMethodName]
      FROM [Transactions] AS [t]
      INNER JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [t].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
      LEFT JOIN [PaymentMethods] AS [p] ON [t].[PaymentMethodId] = [p].[Id]
      WHERE [t].[Date] >= @__start_0 AND [t].[Date] <= @__end_1 AND (([t].[PaymentMethodId] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[PaymentMethodId] IN (
          SELECT [m].[value]
          FROM OPENJSON(@__mpMethodIds_2) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [m]
      )) OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%Mercado Pago%') OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%QR%'))
      ORDER BY [t].[Date] DESC

          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

      FROM (
          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          WHEN [p].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p].[Name]
          ELSE N'Mercado Pago'
      END AS [PaymentMethodName]
      FROM [Transactions] AS [t]
      INNER JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [t].[UserId] = [a].[Id]

      WHERE [t].[Date] >= @__start_0 AND [t].[Date] <= @__end_1 AND (([t].[PaymentMethodId] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[PaymentMethodId] IN (
          SELECT [m].[value]
          FROM OPENJSON(@__mpMethodIds_2) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [m]
      )) OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%Mercado Pago%') OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%QR%'))
      ORDER BY [t].[Date] DESC

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

info: Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command[20101]
      Executed DbCommand (40ms) [Parameters=[@__start_0='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__end_1='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__mpMethodIds_2='?' (Size = 4000)], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Amount], [t].[Date], [t].[Description], [t].[ProcessedBy], [a].[FullName] AS [UserFullName], [t].[BookingId], [t].[SpaceBookingId], CASE
          WHEN [p].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p].[Name]
          ELSE N'Mercado Pago'
      END AS [PaymentMethodName]
      FROM [Transactions] AS [t]
      INNER JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [t].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
      LEFT JOIN [PaymentMethods] AS [p] ON [t].[PaymentMethodId] = [p].[Id]
      WHERE [t].[Date] >= @__start_0 AND [t].[Date] <= @__end_1 AND (([t].[PaymentMethodId] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[PaymentMethodId] IN (
          SELECT [m].[value]
          FROM OPENJSON(@__mpMethodIds_2) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [m]
      )) OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%Mercado Pago%') OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%QR%'))
      ORDER BY [t].[Date] DESC

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

          SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CourtId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[DepositPaid], [b].[EndTime], [b].[GuestEmail], [b].[GuestName], [b].[GuestPhone], [b].[Price], [b].[RecurrenceGroupId], [b].[RentFractions], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[CanAccessActivities], [a].[CanAccessBookings], [a].[City], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Dni], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FullName], [a].[IsActive], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[PhotoUrl], [a].[PlayerLevel], [a].[Province], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [c].[Id] AS [Id1], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[IsIndoor], [c].[Name], [c].[PricePerHour], [c].[SurfaceType]
          FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
          LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [b].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
          INNER JOIN [Courts] AS [c] ON [b].[CourtId] = [c].[Id]
          WHERE [b].[Id] = @__id_0
      ) AS [s]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[EndDate], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsPaid], [u].[MembershipId], [u].[StartDate], [u].[UserId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [m].[CreatedAt], [m].[Description], [m].[DiscountPercentage], [m].[HexColor], [m].[MonthlyPrice], [m].[Name]
          FROM [UserMemberships] AS [u]
          INNER JOIN [Memberships] AS [m] ON [u].[MembershipId] = [m].[Id]
      ) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id0] = [s0].[UserId]
      LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BookingId], [b0].[CreatedAt], [b0].[DepositPaid], [b0].[Fractions], [b0].[IsComboRedeemed], [b0].[IsPaid], [b0].[Notes], [b0].[ProductId], [b0].[Quantity], [b0].[SpaceBookingId], [b0].[UnitPrice], [b0].[UserId], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[Category], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[FinalPrice], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[InternalCode], [p].[InternalTaxAmount], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDoubleUnitCombo], [p].[IsRecipe], [p].[IsSellable], [p].[IvaPercentage], [p].[MarginPercentage], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[PurchaseYield], [p].[Stock]
          FROM [BookingConsumptions] AS [b0]
          INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [b0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
      ) AS [s1] ON [s].[Id] = [s1].[BookingId]
      ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Id0], [s1].[Id]

      SELECT [p].[Id]
      FROM [PaymentMethods] AS [p]
      WHERE [p].[Name] LIKE N'%Mercado Pago%' OR [p].[Name] LIKE N'%QR%' OR [p].[Name] LIKE N'%MP%'
info: Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command[20101]
      Executed DbCommand (44ms) [Parameters=[@__start_0='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__end_1='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__mpMethodIds_2='?' (Size = 4000)], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Amount], [t].[Date], [t].[Description], [t].[ProcessedBy], [a].[FullName] AS [UserFullName], [t].[BookingId], [t].[SpaceBookingId], CASE
          WHEN [p].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p].[Name]
          ELSE N'Mercado Pago'
      END AS [PaymentMethodName]
      FROM [Transactions] AS [t]
      INNER JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [t].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
      LEFT JOIN [PaymentMethods] AS [p] ON [t].[PaymentMethodId] = [p].[Id]
      WHERE [t].[Date] >= @__start_0 AND [t].[Date] <= @__end_1 AND (([t].[PaymentMethodId] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[PaymentMethodId] IN (
          SELECT [m].[value]
          FROM OPENJSON(@__mpMethodIds_2) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [m]
      )) OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%Mercado Pago%') OR ([t].[Description] IS NOT NULL AND [t].[Description] LIKE N'%QR%'))
      ORDER BY [t].[Date] DESC
